title: Premium Youth-Culture Advertising Poster
sourceTitle: Premium Youth Culture Sneaker Storage Box Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium 9:16 youth-culture advertising poster centered on vibrant limited-edition sneaker inside a transparent sneaker storage box. Subject: vibrant limited-edition sneaker sits inside the clear storage box with collectible stickers, streetwear tags, mini polaroids, festival wristbands, and graphic cards, all displayed like a prized streetwear collection. Scene: Electric blue and bright orange background with streetwear stickers, barcode labels, doodles, collage textures, paper-cut elements, and Instagram-viral collector culture. Composition: Transparent sneaker box positioned perfectly center; huge typography KEEP THE HEAT partially hidden behind the box; collectible contents layered visibly inside, with premium editorial branding and balanced poster hierarchy. Signature Elements: Preserved premium youth culture sneaker storage box poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Streetwear collector culture, premium youth-culture advertising, editorial branding, Instagram-viral aesthetic, 8K masterpiece detail, and bold social-poster impact. Color Palette: Electric blue, bright orange, clear plastic reflections, sneaker accent colors, black barcode details, sticker whites, and high-energy streetwear contrast. Lighting: Crisp commercial lighting on transparent plastic, glossy box reflections, sharp sneaker detail, clean sticker visibility, and vivid background glow. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
